ideation: This sequence will depict a wizard's arm movements, emphasizing mystical gestures.  The animation will start with arms slightly raised, palms facing up, as if gathering magical energy. Then, one arm will move downward in a sweeping motion, as if casting a spell, while the other arm remains in a raised position. Finally, both arms will return to a neutral position, suggesting the spell's completion.  The movements will be slow and deliberate, reflecting the careful nature of magical incantations. The lack of elbows will be addressed by using the shoulder joints to create a flowing, sweeping motion.

frames.beat: arms rise, palms up, gathering mystic energy
left arm sweeps down, casting a silent spell
right arm follows, the spell's power unleashed
both arms return to rest, magic complete
